creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-21 20:53:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/xfburn      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Xfburn is a simple CD/DVD burning tool based on libburnia libraries.
  It can blank CD/DVD-RWs, burn and create iso images, as well as
  burn personal compositions of data to either CD or DVD. It Is
  currently under heavy development.
  
  WWW: http://www.xfce.org/projects/xfburn/
  
  PR:             ports/128793
  Submitted by:   J.R. Oldroyd <fbsd at opal.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1044    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/sysutils/xfburn/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/xfburn/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/sysutils/xfburn/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +150 -0    ports/sysutils/xfburn/pkg-plist (new)
